CONTENT.Career: In the 2016–17 season, Adamyan scored 16 goals and made 5 assists in 33 Regionalliga Südwest matches for TSV Steinbach.On 5 June 2017, he signed a two-year contract with 2. Bundesliga side SSV Jahn Regensburg.Adamyan signed a three-year contract with Bundesliga club TSG Hoffenheim on 14 May 2019.In January 2022 he was loaned to Belgian side Club Brugge to the end of the 2021–22 season, with an option to buy.After the end of his loan at Brugge, Adamyan transferred to 1. FC Köln, where he signed a contract until 2026.
CONTENT.Early life: Born in Yerevan, Armenia, Adamyan moved to Germany at age five. He spent some of his youth years at Hansa Rostock.
CONTENT.Personal life: In August 2021, Adamyan married German model Anna Wilken, who is known from Germany's Next Topmodel.
CONTENT.External links: Sargis Adamyan at fussballdaten.de (in German)Sargis Adamyan at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 22 May 2021As of match played 8 September 2023Scores and results list Armenia's goal tally first.

SUMMARY: Sargis Adamyan (Armenian: Սարգիս Ադամյան; born 23 May 1993) is an Armenian professional footballer who plays for Bundesliga club 1. FC Köln and the Armenia national team as of 2022.
